headline: OpenAI admits enterprises need better control over AI costs
summary: Global spending on artificial intelligence will reach $2.59 trillion in 2026, according to a Gartner forecast, a 47% jump from last year. That number covers more than chips and data centers. It also covers the bill companies run up every time an employee or an AI agent sends a request to a model ...
